# WishList App
> Free online wishlist maker. Create a wish list in seconds, share a private link,
  and let friends anonymously claim gifts. No ads. Ukrainian and English.

## Pages
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/ua
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/en
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/en/wishlist/christmas-list
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/ua/wishlist/christmas-list-ua
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/en/wishlist/birthday-list
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/ua/wishlist/birthday-list-ua
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/en/wishlist/secret-santa-list
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/ua/wishlist/secret-santa-list-ua
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/en/wishlist/wedding-list
https://wishlistapp.com.ua/ua/wishlist/wedding-list-ua
